post.title: Sum, and bias... Intraday post (09/May), Bear market? Balance?
post.description: Now that we’re beyond the 20-day window during which the market hit the level (last year April’s lows) below which I had anticipated volatility selling and consolidation, realized volatility fell from 42.29% to 27.67%.
